title: Opening Menorca 2026
location: Galerías, museos y talleres de toda la isla (Maó, Ciutadella y otros municipios)
description: For nearly three weeks, Menorca presents itself as a contemporary-art destination, with simultaneous openings across galleries, artists' studios and museums. The inaugural gala opens on 7 April at the Teatre Principal de Maó and the programme runs until 25 April. Organised by the Fundació Foment del Turisme de Menorca and the Consell Insular.
